Reliable Towing Services in Cape Coral

Help is just a phone call away when you get in touch with Danny's Pro Paint and Body Shop for 24-hour towing service. Our comprehensive towing services are designed to provide you with peace of mind. We offer:


  • Light and medium-duty towing

Exceptional Service You Can Trust

Choosing Danny's Pro Paint and Body Shop for your towing needs guarantees a range of benefits that set us apart. Our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction is evident in every service we provide. Here’s what you can expect:


  • Since 2017

  • Free estimates
  • High-quality service
  • Military discounts
  • Over 10 years of experience
